title: Ched's Realism ModPack
description: All the NeoForge mods I use alongside Ched's Realism Mod for the ultimate optimized creative building experience.
body:
# The Ultimate NeoForge Realistic Building Experience
This pack includes all the mods I use on my own personal worlds that you may have seen in screenshots. Axiom and Worldedit were included to make fast building easier. I have added some performance optimization mods as well to make sure most PCs could handle the mod even though it is fairly low resource for what it is.

I will keep updating if there is interest in a pack like this, I have also included the Ched's Realism CTM pack for ease of access to all the benefits of Ched's Realism Mod.
![Discover Real Life in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/758a8cf7d71a8a337d5a7a4af9349ad34105a2b4.webp)
